release_notes: Automatic Context Reset & Default State Management: desktop/utils/state_reset.py StateResetManager (reset_pos/product/purchase/stock/customer/consumption/debt + modal clear-on-close), Settings → Workflow After Sale defaults, POS forces Walk-in + Cash after every successful sale including credit. Preserves UI theme audit 2.3.56, Dropdowns 2.3.54, Cash Rounding 2.3.53, Payment Variance, Consumption, credit-sale inline customer. No Setup/GitHub Release publish.
